title: Network Vulnerability Scanner
description: A Flask-based vulnerability scanner with CVE lookup, authentication and report generation.

title: Secure Password Manager
description: A Python password manager with encryption, authentication and secure password generation.

title: Anti-Phishing Browser Extension
description: A Chrome extension designed to detect and warn users about suspicious phishing websites in real time using URL analysis and browser-based security checks.

title: Cybersecurity Portfolio Website
description: A responsive cybersecurity portfolio website built using HTML, CSS and JavaScript to showcase cybersecurity projects, certifications, technical skills and GitHub repositories.
